title: Subitems / Dashboards
excerpt: Hello, boards with subitems currently filter strange “subitem” sections into my dashboards. I can’t find a way to keep them from filtering into the dashboard… other than deleting the “subitem” column from the original bo…

posts.author: Rebekah (Rebekah Van Dyk)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, boards with subitems currently filter strange “subitem” sections into my dashboards. I can’t find a way to keep them from filtering into the dashboard… other than deleting the “subitem” column from the original board. Help?
